gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.Location = 'India' AND T1.Name = 'Teacher'
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) 
FROM users AS T1 
INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId 
WHERE TRIM(T1.Location) = 'India' 
AND T2.Name = 'Teacher'
question: How many users from India have the teacher badges?
